description: Create a T-shaped commercial building in SketchUp and install solar panels on its flat roof using the Skelion plugin. 1. Draw a T-shaped building footprint on the ground plane (Top bar: 80 feet wide x 30 feet deep; Stem: 30 feet wide x 50 feet long, centered on the bottom edge of the top bar). 2. Extrude the footprint upward to 16 feet tall. 3. Select the top (roof) face. 4. Use Skelion to insert solar panels onto the selected roof face in landscape orientation using default dimensions. 5. Save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\t_shaped_solar.skp'.
